prompt: Edit image 1 (the diagram). Add a small green car icon inspired by image 2 next to the 'DDIM Inversion' box. Add a small blue car icon inspired by image 3 next to the 'I2V Model' box. Change the color of the arrows feeding into 'DDIM Inversion' to green and into 'I2V Model' to blue.
prompt_refined:
Edit image 1, which is a scientific diagram illustrating a video processing pipeline.
Add a small icon of a green car, inspired by the overall shape and side-view style of the car in image 2, positioned immediately to the right of the 'DDIM Inversion' box.
Add a small icon of a blue car, inspired by the overall shape and side-view style of the car in image 3, positioned immediately to the right of the 'I2V Model' box.
Change the color of the arrow feeding into the 'DDIM Inversion' box (the horizontal arrow originating from the left) to green.
Change the color of all arrows feeding into the 'I2V Model' box (specifically, the horizontal arrow from 'DDIM Inversion' and the vertical arrow from 'ZT_S') to blue.
